## Scope

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Packaging / release
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Backend / CLI
- [ ] Security review follow-up

## Validation

List commands run and manual checks completed.

## Security and Compatibility

- [ ] This does not weaken cryptographic behavior or add fallback crypto.
- [ ] This does not change `.avk` compatibility unless explicitly documented.
- [ ] This does not include secrets, private keyfiles, decrypted files, or sensitive logs.

## Maintainer Notice

Avikal is maintainer-led. Unsolicited pull requests may be declined or deferred. For major changes, open an issue or security review note first.
